title: Pearl PVP
description: Its a PVP themed pack relating to a Pearl as the golden apple. Its made for mainly sword and netherite pot gamemodes.
body:
This Pack is made specially for different game modes of player versus player with the same pack, such as sword, pot, and newer pot. Including bits of crystal. Its themed around pearls and is shown as by the pearl golden apple. (This pack is spesifically my pvp pack, i just named it pearl as a great theme that i like about it, so there are items like the totem thats my skin.)

Related Video: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PbibiN8YTxE&t=10s](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PbibiN8YTxE&t=10s)

DISCLAIMER: This pack is inspired by the following packs and some textures taken from the following packs:

Better HUD icons
Chroma Faithful
LowOnFire_1.21
ShieldCorrectionsColored
Torrezx-Better_Mace
3D-Crystalsc
Sharpness [300K]

**Thanks for the Download!**
